Metadata.title: Online CV Builder | Typst CV Maker
Metadata.description: Create, preview, export, and optionally sync CV documents.

warning.title: Before you continue:
warning.item1: The server does not store your password. If you forget it, the CV cannot be recovered.
warning.item2: After enabling encryption, changes are not saved automatically. You must click Save after editing, or your changes will be lost.

ImportExportErrorModal.title: Import/Export Error
ImportExportErrorModal.description: Please check the file format and try again. If the problem persists, ensure the file is a valid CV JSON export.
